raw_consumer_statement:
Approximately three months ago, I contacted American Express by phone to report unauthorized charges on my credit card totaling approximately {$1000.00}. I did not make, authorize, or benefit from these transactions. 

At the time of my call, I was told the matter would be handled. However, I have since been unable to access my online account due to security restrictions, as I am currently outside the United States. 

Despite having reported the fraud, I am now receiving emails indicating that the account is past due and demanding payment for charges that are not mine. I have not received any written confirmation regarding the status or outcome of the fraud investigation. 

I have attempted to obtain information from the company, but I have not been provided with a clear resolution or restored account access. 

I am requesting that the fraudulent charges be removed, the fraud investigation be properly completed, all late fees and penalties be waived, and that no negative credit reporting occur related to this matter.
